content:
# Transverse Isotropy

**Summary**: A type of seismic anisotropy where properties vary with direction but are symmetric about a vertical axis.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] evaluated transverse-isotropy to correct for its effects on hypocenter location accuracy.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] Critical for accurate prediction of arrival times in heterogeneous media.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] modeled as a component of the velocity structure

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Transverse Isotropy velocity model calibration is the most suitable solution to correct for anisotropy effects. ([[2015-own|Own, 2015, p. 20]])
